title: Fabric Seasons: Delight Refabricated Compat
description: Farmer's Delight Refabricated compatibility for Fabric Seasons
body:
## Note

This is a fork of [Fabric Seasons: Delight Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-delight-compat). Corrects rice & tomato problems with Farmer's Delight Refabricated.

## Description

This mod adds crop compatibility for Farmer's Delight Refabricated crops, allowing them to have different growing speeds according to the current season.
